schemes.name: Khelo India Programme
schemes.benefit: Annual scholarship Rs 6.4 lakh/year for 1,000 talented athletes (Under-18 & Under-23)
schemes.benefit_hi: 1,000 प्रतिभाशाली एथलीट (U18 & U23) को ₹6.4 लाख/वर्ष छात्रवृत्ति
schemes.eligibility: Young athletes identified through Khelo India Games, age < 18 or < 23

schemes.name: Target Olympic Podium Scheme (TOPS)
schemes.benefit: Rs 50,000/month cash support + international training + equipment for Olympic hopefuls
schemes.benefit_hi: ओलंपिक संभावित खिलाड़ियों को ₹50,000/माह + विदेश प्रशिक्षण + उपकरण
schemes.eligibility: Elite Indian athletes shortlisted by Mission Olympic Cell

schemes.name: National Sports Development Fund (NSDF)
schemes.benefit: Financial grants for sports infrastructure, athlete training, and sports excellence
schemes.benefit_hi: खेल बुनियादी ढाँचे, प्रशिक्षण और उत्कृष्टता के लिए अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: National sports federations, state sports bodies, exceptional athletes

schemes.name: Pension to Meritorious Sportspersons
schemes.benefit: Monthly pension Rs 12,000-25,000 for Olympic/CWG/Asian Games medalists in financial need
schemes.benefit_hi: ओलंपिक/CWG/एशियाई खेल पदक विजेता जरूरतमंद खिलाड़ियों को ₹12,000-25,000/माह
schemes.eligibility: Indian sportspersons who won medals at Olympics/CWG/Asian Games

schemes.name: SAI National Coaching Scheme
schemes.benefit: Free national-level coaching at SAI centres across India + boarding
schemes.benefit_hi: SAI केंद्रों में मुफ्त राष्ट्रीय स्तरीय कोचिंग + आवास
schemes.eligibility: Athletes selected through SAI talent identification (age 8-25)

schemes.name: Sports Injury Fund
schemes.benefit: Medical assistance up to Rs 20 lakh for sportspersons injured during national/international events
schemes.benefit_hi: राष्ट्रीय/अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्पर्धा में घायल खिलाड़ियों को ₹20 लाख तक चिकित्सा सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Sportspersons representing India at national/international level

schemes.name: Rajiv Gandhi Khel Ratna (Major Dhyan Chand)
schemes.benefit: Cash award Rs 25 lakh + citation for highest sporting honour in India
schemes.benefit_hi: भारत का सर्वोच्च खेल सम्मान — ₹25 लाख + प्रमाण पत्र
schemes.eligibility: Sportspersons with spectacular performance over 4 years

schemes.name: Arjuna Award
schemes.benefit: Cash award Rs 15 lakh + bronze statue + citation for consistent sporting excellence
schemes.benefit_hi: सतत खेल उत्कृष्टता के लिए ₹15 लाख + कांस्य प्रतिमा
schemes.eligibility: Sportspersons with 4 years of consistent international performance

schemes.name: Dronacharya Award (Sports Coaches)
schemes.benefit: Rs 15 lakh + bronze statue for coaches who produce international medal winners
schemes.benefit_hi: अंतरराष्ट्रीय पदक विजेता तैयार करने वाले कोच को ₹15 लाख + कांस्य प्रतिमा
schemes.eligibility: Coaches who produced medallists at Olympics/CWG/Asian Games

schemes.name: Khelo India University Games Scholarship
schemes.benefit: Rs 6.4 lakh/year scholarship to outstanding performers at Khelo India University Games
schemes.benefit_hi: Khelo India University Games के शीर्ष खिलाड़ियों को ₹6.4 लाख/वर्ष छात्रवृत्ति
schemes.eligibility: Students competing at Khelo India University Games (degree enrolled)

schemes.name: Paralympic Sports Scheme
schemes.benefit: Rs 6.4 lakh/year for para-athletes + specialized equipment + coaching support
schemes.benefit_hi: पैरा-एथलीटों को ₹6.4 लाख/वर्ष + विशेष उपकरण + कोचिंग
schemes.eligibility: Para-athletes selected for national level competition
